message:
bd-3bxhj.4.4: View/layout translator for ftui-layout and widget composition

Translates OpenTUI view trees and layout semantics into ftui-layout
constraints and widget types. Covers widget type inference from node
kind + name heuristics, layout inference chain from style intents, focus
group translation, and conditional rendering preservation.

19 tests passing.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
